cases.scenario: API gateway caching proposal before authorization boundary proof
cases.survival_guard: authorization boundary must survive before cache optimization
cases.optimization_candidate: increase cache hit ratio by bypassing repeated authorization checks

cases.scenario: Bridge material reduction proposal before load survival proof
cases.survival_guard: load-bearing safety margin must survive before material optimization
cases.optimization_candidate: reduce beam material to lower cost and mass

cases.scenario: Approval removal proposal before authority preservation proof
cases.survival_guard: approval authority chain must survive before process optimization
cases.optimization_candidate: remove second approval to reduce cycle time

cases.scenario: Payment batching proposal before spend authority proof
cases.survival_guard: spend authority and approval receipt must survive before payment throughput optimization
cases.optimization_candidate: batch vendor payments without per-payment approval receipt checks

cases.scenario: Queue throughput tuning proposal before recovery-path proof
cases.survival_guard: rollback and replay path must survive before dispatch throughput optimization
cases.optimization_candidate: increase worker lease concurrency before replay cursor safety is proven
